verbal.text: Hello and welcome! Before we begin, let's spend some time getting familiar with how to interact with me. We will learn how the LED indicators work and practice a few short interactions together.
When my LEDs are green, as you will see, it is your turn to speak and that means I am actively listening.
When you see blue, I have detected a pause request and will stop at the next appropriate point.
If yellow, I am processing information or preparing feedback.
Lastly, if you see red, it means I was unable to clearly understand what was said and may ask for the response again.
Lets do some practice now. Once I indicate to you that I am listening, tell me your favorite animal.
Now lets practice asking a simple question. Ask me what my favorite color is.
Now, tell me your favorite season.
Finally, use the pause commands found on the top left of your sheet to practice pausing me.
Excellent. You now know what the LED indicators mean and how to interact with me. We are ready to begin by moving into the bulk of the training.
